examples.text: فتحت ميشيل صندوقها الأسود القابع في أعماقها
examples.english: Michelle opened her rarely visited black box in the bottom of her soul

examples.text: يضغط صندوق النقد الدولي على باكستان لجباية الضرائب من أصحاب الأراضي الزراعية
examples.english: The International Monetary Fund is putting pressure on Pakistan to collect taxes from the owners of agricultural land.

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Proto-Indo-European *sem-der.?
Proto-Hellenic *ksún
Ancient Greek σύν (sún)
Ancient Greek συν- (sun-)
Proto-Indo-European *dʰeh₁-
Proto-Indo-European *dʰédʰeh₁ti
Ancient Greek τίθημι (títhēmi)
Ancient Greek σῠντῐ́θημῐ (sŭntĭ́thēmĭ)
Ancient Greek σῠνθήκη (sŭnthḗkē)bor.
Aramaic צנדוק (ṣəndūq)bor.
Arabic صندوق
Borrowed from Aramaic צנדוק (ṣəndūq, “coffer, especially one storing documents, safe-guarding precious items”), borrowed from Ancient Greek σῠνθήκη (sŭnthḗkē), from σῠντῐ́θημῐ (sŭntĭ́thēmĭ, “to place or put together”), from συν- (sun-) + τίθημι (títhēmi).
